TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Jerome Allen == mhtuw ryax tay 28 na byacing te 1 nquw kawas ta 1973 squw Philadelphia quw Jerome Byron Allen. nalan unroing na MBA pzyuwi' mari' na yawa', ruw kyoreng misuw qani na NBA. 193cm kinwagiq' niya, ruw 84kg kin'usuw niya', kki'an niya' squw pzyuwi'an mari' ga maki' beh suruw ka psru' maras mari'. squw mqwas biru' raygak na mnluw squw gluw pzyuwi'an na Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, ruw minpusal magal sa pzyang blaq balay na sinsyuw pzyuwi' mari'. sa min sazing thwiru' mspung squw kawas te 1995 ga maki' squw binkgan te 49 quw lalu' niya', ruw wal galun kya na Minnesota Timberwolves. ryax niya' pinzyuwi' niya' mari' ga minluw Minnesota, llindiana,Pacers, Penver Nuggets ruw gluw na Union Europeenne. ryax niya mzyuwi' mari' NBA ga 336 kwara' 'ngal niya' tesu', 123 quw qnul maki' zin na yawa', 201 quw niwan wal niya' sraw magal tinsu' sa gluw niya'. kinmuci' na kirok niya' ga, minsazing mluw sa Iby League MVP. minkirok na ryax pinzyuwi'an niya' 1993~ 1995 minttzyul maras sa pennsylvanin magal icibang na IVY League. kawas te 1995 ga mzyup qsahuy na giqas na sinsyuw NBA, t'aring kya quw ppzyuwi' niya' markinmecyuw na pinhaw pbuling mari'i' la. 200 lga thuyay mgkyoreng na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2014~ 2015 lga thuyay mgkyoreng kwara' na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2015 ruw misuw qaniy lga galan praw kyoreng na Boston Celtics. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Jerome Allen. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Jerome Allen
S.PHON: == *erome allen == mńßtuw rjax taj ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * nquw kawas~…ē ta **** s~…ēquw pńßila*elpńßia quw *erome ő≤jron allen. nalan unroiŇč na mő≤a pzjuwi Ē mari Ē na jawa Ē, ruw kjoreŇč mis~…ēuw qani na nő≤a. *** ¶~ ®m kinwa…£iq Ē nija, ruw **k…£ kin Ēus~…ēuw nija Ē, kki Ēan nija Ē s~…ēquw pzjuwi Ēan mari Ē …£a maki Ē ő≤eńß s~…ēuruw ka ps~…ēru Ē maras~…ē mari Ē. s~…ēquw mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē raj…£ak na mnluw s~…ēquw …£luw pzjuwi Ēan na ¶~ ®ommonwealtńß o* penns~…ējl*ania, ruw minpus~…ēal ma…£al s~…ēa pzjaŇč ő≤laq ő≤alaj na s~…ēins~…ējuw pzjuwi Ē mari Ē. s~…ēa min s~…ēaziŇč tńßwiru Ē ms~…ēpuŇč s~…ēquw kawas~…ē te **** …£a maki Ē s~…ēquw ő≤ink…£an te ** quw lalu Ē nija Ē, ruw wal …£alun kja na minnes~…ēota timő≤erwol*es~…ē. rjax nija Ē pinzjuwi Ē nija Ē mari Ē …£a minluw minnes~…ēota, llin*iana,pa ¶~ ®ers~…ē, pen*er nu…£…£ets~…ē ruw …£luw na union europeenne. rjax nija mzjuwi Ē mari Ē nő≤a …£a *** kwara Ē ĒŇčal nija Ē tes~…ēu Ē, *** quw qnul maki Ē zin na jawa Ē, *** quw niwan wal nija Ē s~…ēraw ma…£al tins~…ēu Ē s~…ēa …£luw nija Ē. kinmu ¶~ ®i Ē na kirok nija Ē …£a, mins~…ēaziŇč mluw s~…ēa iő≤j lea…£ue m*p. minkirok na rjax pinzjuwi Ēan nija Ē ****~ **** minttzjul maras~…ē s~…ēa penns~…ējl*anin ma…£al i ¶~ ®iő≤aŇč na i*j lea…£ue. kawas~…ē te **** …£a mzjup qs~…ēańßuj na …£iqas~…ē na s~…ēins~…ējuw nő≤a, t ĒariŇč kja quw ppzjuwi Ē nija Ē markinme ¶~ ®juw na pinńßaw pő≤uliŇč mari Ēi Ē la. *** l…£a tńßujaj m…£kjoreŇč na raj…£ak penns~…ējl*anin la. ****~ **** l…£a tńßujaj m…£kjoreŇč kwara Ē na raj…£ak penns~…ējl*anin la. **** ruw mis~…ēuw qanij l…£a …£alan praw kjoreŇč na ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē pzjux qu wajal nija Ē kirok ni *erome allen. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē *erome allen
S.FORM: == Jerome Allen == mhtuw ryax tay 28 na byacing te 1 nquw kawas ta 1973 squw Philadelphia quw Jerome Byron Allen. nalan unroing na MBA pzyuwi' mari' na yawa', ruw kyoreng misuw qani na NBA. 193cm kinwagiq' niya, ruw 84kg kin'usuw niya', kki'an niya' squw pzyuwi'an mari' ga maki' beh suruw ka psru' maras mari'. squw mqwas biru' raygak na mnluw squw gluw pzyuwi'an na Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, ruw minpusal magal sa pzyang blaq balay na sinsyuw pzyuwi' mari'. sa min sazing thwiru' mspung squw kawas te 1995 ga maki' squw binkgan te 49 quw lalu' niya', ruw wal galun kya na Minnesota Timberwolves. ryax niya' pinzyuwi' niya' mari' ga minluw Minnesota, llindiana,Pacers, Penver Nuggets ruw gluw na Union Europeenne. ryax niya mzyuwi' mari' NBA ga 336 kwara' 'ngal niya' tesu', 123 quw qnul maki' zin na yawa', 201 quw niwan wal niya' sraw magal tinsu' sa gluw niya'. kinmuci' na kirok niya' ga, minsazing mluw sa Iby League MVP. minkirok na ryax pinzyuwi'an niya' 1993~ 1995 minttzyul maras sa pennsylvanin magal icibang na IVY League. kawas te 1995 ga mzyup qsahuy na giqas na sinsyuw NBA, t'aring kya quw ppzyuwi' niya' markinmecyuw na pinhaw pbuling mari'i' la. 200 lga thuyay mgkyoreng na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2014~ 2015 lga thuyay mgkyoreng kwara' na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2015 ruw misuw qaniy lga galan praw kyoreng na Boston Celtics. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Jerome Allen. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Jerome Allen
S.PHON: == *erome allen == mńßtuw rjax taj ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * nquw kawas~…ē ta **** s~…ēquw pńßila*elpńßia quw *erome ő≤jron allen. nalan unroiŇč na mő≤a pzjuwi Ē mari Ē na jawa Ē, ruw kjoreŇč mis~…ēuw qani na nő≤a. *** ¶~ ®m kinwa…£iq Ē nija, ruw **k…£ kin Ēus~…ēuw nija Ē, kki Ēan nija Ē s~…ēquw pzjuwi Ēan mari Ē …£a maki Ē ő≤eńß s~…ēuruw ka ps~…ēru Ē maras~…ē mari Ē. s~…ēquw mqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē raj…£ak na mnluw s~…ēquw …£luw pzjuwi Ēan na ¶~ ®ommonwealtńß o* penns~…ējl*ania, ruw minpus~…ēal ma…£al s~…ēa pzjaŇč ő≤laq ő≤alaj na s~…ēins~…ējuw pzjuwi Ē mari Ē. s~…ēa min s~…ēaziŇč tńßwiru Ē ms~…ēpuŇč s~…ēquw kawas~…ē te **** …£a maki Ē s~…ēquw ő≤ink…£an te ** quw lalu Ē nija Ē, ruw wal …£alun kja na minnes~…ēota timő≤erwol*es~…ē. rjax nija Ē pinzjuwi Ē nija Ē mari Ē …£a minluw minnes~…ēota, llin*iana,pa ¶~ ®ers~…ē, pen*er nu…£…£ets~…ē ruw …£luw na union europeenne. rjax nija mzjuwi Ē mari Ē nő≤a …£a *** kwara Ē ĒŇčal nija Ē tes~…ēu Ē, *** quw qnul maki Ē zin na jawa Ē, *** quw niwan wal nija Ē s~…ēraw ma…£al tins~…ēu Ē s~…ēa …£luw nija Ē. kinmu ¶~ ®i Ē na kirok nija Ē …£a, mins~…ēaziŇč mluw s~…ēa iő≤j lea…£ue m*p. minkirok na rjax pinzjuwi Ēan nija Ē ****~ **** minttzjul maras~…ē s~…ēa penns~…ējl*anin ma…£al i ¶~ ®iő≤aŇč na i*j lea…£ue. kawas~…ē te **** …£a mzjup qs~…ēańßuj na …£iqas~…ē na s~…ēins~…ējuw nő≤a, t ĒariŇč kja quw ppzjuwi Ē nija Ē markinme ¶~ ®juw na pinńßaw pő≤uliŇč mari Ēi Ē la. *** l…£a tńßujaj m…£kjoreŇč na raj…£ak penns~…ējl*anin la. ****~ **** l…£a tńßujaj m…£kjoreŇč kwara Ē na raj…£ak penns~…ējl*anin la. **** ruw mis~…ēuw qanij l…£a …£alan praw kjoreŇč na ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē pzjux qu wajal nija Ē kirok ni *erome allen. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē *erome allen
